description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the erlang:19.3 Docker image. Add a global before_script that runs apt-get update -y, installs g++-4.9 with apt-get -y install g++-4.9, and exports CXX=g++-4.9. Define a test job (stage test) that executes rebar3 ct. Configure the test job to always upload the _build/test/logs directory as artifacts.
